title: eryngium pandanifolium
intro: Eryngium pandanifolium, also known as the 'Pandan-leaved Sea Holly', is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eryngium pandanifolium include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, Eryngium pandanifolium is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
